{{Quote|Bley-San is a good woman. You can trust her.|[[Ygabba Hise]]|<ref name="Boba Fett: Hunted">''[[Boba Fett: Hunted]]''</ref>}}
'''Bley-San''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] living on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. She owned a cantina in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]]. When [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] killed [[Gilramos Libkath]] to receive a bounty from [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]], [[Ygabba Hise]] said that Bley-San would help the kids find their families and relatives back since she still owed her a favor for unnamed reasons.
